jobs.message: AUTONOMOUS SCAN: Search Iran successor news. Check trending Polymarket markets. If high-confidence news found AND market hasn't adjusted, recommend trade (max $2, min 15% edge). Send WhatsApp summary with opportunities.

PRICE ALERT: Check Arafi market price (ID: 1469384). Current position: 2 YES @ $0.22 entry. Alert if price moves >10%. If price >= $0.50, send profit alert. If price <= $0.15, send loss warning. Include current P&L in WhatsApp message.
